CHAIR: I call this meeting to order. Today we have two agenda items.
CHAIR: Item 1: 3.5 GHz band sharing proposal.
ALICE: The FCC approved the SAS-only sharing framework for Phase 1.
BOB: NTIA deferred the technical specification review until next quarter.
CHAIR: Item 2: action items and follow-ups.
ALICE: Carol will draft the FCC response document by Friday.
BOB: Dan coordinates with NTIA on the testing schedule next week.
CHAIR: Do we need a separate eval for ambiguous sharing rules?
ALICE: The committee discussed the proposed amendment to the coordination window.
DECISION: Approved the SAS-only sharing framework for Phase 1.
DECISION: Deferred the technical specification review until next quarter.
ACTION: Carol drafts the FCC response document by Friday.
ACTION: Dan coordinates with NTIA on the testing schedule next week.
QUESTION: Do we need a separate eval for ambiguous sharing rules?
CONTEXT: Item 1 covers the 3.5 GHz band sharing proposal.
OPTION: Continue the current SAS-only sharing arrangement.
OPTION: Move to a hybrid SAS plus incumbent coordination framework.
RECOMMENDATION: Adopt the hybrid SAS plus incumbent coordination framework.
RATIONALE: Hybrid coordination preserves SAS flexibility while protecting incumbents.
AGENCY: FCC
CITATION: 47 CFR 96 Subpart F
MEETING_REF: Q2-2026 spectrum coordination sync
